'''Anya Darklighter''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the daughter of [[Jula Darklighter|Jula]] and [[Silya Darklighter]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. Her siblings were [[Rasca Darklighter]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Gavin Darklighter]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], she found [[Shmi Skywalker's journal]] near a [[Moisture vaporator/Legends|moisture vaporator]].
